name: WFGY
description: WFGY is heading toward WFGY 5.0 Polaris Protocol, a major open-source release for AI reasoning, RAG, agents, and real-world workflows. Includes Problem Map, Global Debug Card, WFGY 4.0, and the CFV Easter Egg.
summaryZh: WFGY is heading toward WFGY 5.0 Polaris Protocol, a major open-source release for AI reasoning, RAG, agents, and real-world workflows. Includes Problem Map, Global Debug Card, WFGY 4.0, and the CFV Easter Egg. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
